title: Kukuli
director: Luis Figueroa, Eulogio Nishiyama, César Villanueva
writer: Hernán Velarde, Luis Figueroa, César Villanueva
actors: Judith Figueroa, Victor Chambi, Lizardo Pérez
plot: Kukuli, a young llama herder, leaves her grandparents in the countryside of Cusco to attend the Feast of Mamacha Carmen in the town of Paucartambo.
